ddls:
CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the measurement */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the measurement */,
  "global_active_power" REAL /* Global active power in kilowatts */,
  "global_reactive_power" REAL /* Global reactive power in kilovolt-amperes */,
  "voltage" REAL /* Voltage in volts */,
  "global_intensity" REAL /* Global intensity in amperes */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the unit of measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sub_metering" (
  "sub_metering_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sub-metering measurement */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding measurement */,
  "sub_metering_1" REAL /* Power consumption of sub-metering device 1 in watts */,
  "sub_metering_2" REAL /* Power consumption of sub-metering device 2 in watts */,
  "sub_metering_3" REAL /* Power consumption of sub-metering device 3 in watts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sub_metering_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sub_metering_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device (e.g., kitchen, laundry, heating/cooling) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the device was installed */,
  "device_description" TEXT /* Description of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_measurements" (
  "device_measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device measurement */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding measurement */,
  "power_consumption" REAL /* Power consumption of the device in watts */,
  "energy_consumption" REAL /* Energy consumption of the device in watt-hours */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_measurements_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_measurements_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit (e.g., kilowatts, kilovolt-amperes, volts, amperes) */,
  "unit_description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding measurement */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., high power consumption, unusual pattern) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message associated with the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Time the alert was triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding measurement */,
  "average_power_consumption" REAL /* Average power consumption in kilowatts */,
  "energy_saved" REAL /* Energy saved in kilowatt-hours */,
  "analytics_date" TEXT /* Date the analytics were generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding analytics entry */,
  "recommendation_message" TEXT /* Message associated with the recommendation */,
  "recommended_action" TEXT /* Action recommended for energy saving */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_analytics_id FOREIGN KEY ("analytics_id") REFERENCES analytics ("analytics_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (e.g., admin, regular) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_devices" (
  "user_device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-device association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_devices_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_devices_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message associated with the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_time" TEXT /* Time the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "setting_description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_settings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_tariffs" (
  "tariff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tariff */,
  "tariff_name" TEXT /* Name of the tariff */,
  "tariff_description" TEXT /* Description of the tariff */,
  "tariff_rate" REAL /* Rate of the tariff in dollars per kilowatt-hour */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tariff_id")
)
column_names: Reference to the unit of measurement
